title: It's a Long Way to the Top (If You Wanna Rock 'n' Roll)
description: It's a Long Way to the Top (If You Wanna Rock 'n' Roll) is a classic single by Australian rock band AC/DC, released in 1976.

tracks.title: It's a Long Way to the Top (If You Wanna Rock 'n' Roll)
tracks.lyrics:
Ridin' down the highway
Goin' to a show
Stop in all the byways
Playin' rock 'n' roll

title: Back in Black
description: Back in Black is the seventh studio album by Australian rock band AC/DC, released in 1980. It is one of the best-selling albums of all time.

tracks.title: Hells Bells
tracks.lyrics:
I'm a rollin' thunder, pourin' rain
I'm comin' on like a hurricane

tracks.title: Shoot to Thrill
tracks.lyrics:
All you women who want a man of the street
But you don't know which way you want to turn

tracks.title: Back in Black
tracks.lyrics:
Back in black, I hit the sack
I've been too long, I'm glad to be back

title: Highway to Hell
description: Highway to Hell is the sixth studio album by Australian rock band AC/DC, released in 1979. It was the last album to feature lead singer Bon Scott.

tracks.title: Highway to Hell
tracks.lyrics:
Livin' easy, livin' free
Season ticket on a one-way ride

tracks.title: Girls Got Rhythm
tracks.lyrics:
I've been around the world
I've seen a million girls

tracks.title: Walk All Over You
tracks.lyrics:
Outta my way, I'm runnin' high
Take your chance with me and I'll give it a try

title: For Those About to Rock We Salute You
description: For Those About to Rock We Salute You is the eighth studio album by Australian rock band AC/DC, released in 1980.

tracks.title: For Those About to Rock (We Salute You)
tracks.lyrics:
We roll tonight to the guitar bite
Stand up and be counted

tracks.title: Put the Finger on You
tracks.lyrics:
I got my finger on you
I got my eye on you
